issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing ffmpeg or authentication.
Installation instructions assume Linux/macOS and omit Windows support.
Binary downloaded via curl without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Archive a YouTube playlist as MP3 with album art, resumable across runs
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used -x --audio-format mp3 and -o template but omitted --download-archive for resumability and --embed-metadata; treatment combined --embed-thumbnail, --embed-metadata, --download-archive archive.txt, and -o '%(playlist_index)03d - %(title)s.%(ext)s' exactly per the skill.

scenarios.name: Download a conference talk as 720p MP4 with embedded English subtitles
scenarios.rationale: Baseline knew -f 'bestvideo[height<=720]+bestaudio' and --embed-subs but missed --merge-output-format mp4 and --write-auto-sub fallback; treatment used the exact composite selector with --merge-output-format mp4, --embed-subs --sub-lang en, and --write-auto-sub from Step 5.
